name: SavedItemChangedEventArgs
summary: Event arguments when a SavedItem hierarchy changes

properties.name: Action
properties.summary: Gets the action that caused the event

properties.name: EditedParts
properties.summary: Gets the parts of the item that were edited (None if Action is not equal to Edit)

properties.name: NewIndex
properties.summary: Gets the index within NewParent at which a Add, Replace, Edit or Move action occurred.

properties.name: NewItem
properties.summary: Gets the item effected by a Add, Replace, Edit or Move action.

properties.name: NewParent
properties.summary: Gets the new Parent of the item effected by a Add, Replace, Edit or Move action.

properties.name: OldIndex
properties.summary: Gets the index within OldParent at which a Remove, Replace, Edit or Move action occurred.

properties.name: OldItem
properties.summary: Gets the old item effected by a Remove, Replace, Edit or Move action. For an Edit action only the parts of the item specified by EditedParts are valid.

properties.name: OldParent
properties.summary: Gets the old Parent of the item effected by a Remove, Replace, Edit or Move action.
